# core.solver.TopologyModel { #mlsysim.core.solver.TopologyModel }

```python
core.solver.TopologyModel()
```

Analyzes the 'Locality Wall' — Network topology and bisection bandwidth.

This solver models how the physical arrangement of nodes (Fat-Tree,
Torus, Dragonfly) affects the usable communication bandwidth.

Literature Source:
1. Kim et al. (2008), "Technology-Driven, Low-Latency Network-on-Chip."
2. Dally (1990), "Performance Analysis of Interconnection Networks."
